name: pixiland-db-demo
description: Demo code cho tech talk SQL vs NoSQL (Pixiland case study)

scripts.db:size: npm run db:size:pg && npm run db:size:mongo
scripts.db:size:pg: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U pixi -d postgres -c "SELECT datname AS db, pg_size_pretty(pg_database_size(datname)) AS size FROM pg_database WHERE datname LIKE 'pixiland%' ORDER BY datname;"
scripts.db:size:pg:tables: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U pixi -d pixiland_norm -c "SELECT relname AS \"table\", pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS total FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC;" && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U pixi -d pixiland_jsonb -c "SELECT relname AS \"table\", pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS total FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC;"
scripts.db:size:mongo: docker compose exec -T mongo mongosh pixiland --quiet --eval "['users','wallets','heroes'].forEach(c=>{const s=db.getCollection(c).stats();print(c+'\tdocs='+s.count+'\tlogical='+Math.round(s.size/1024/1024)+'MB\tdisk='+Math.round((s.storageSize+s.totalIndexSize)/1024/1024)+'MB')})"
